_about: Per-method grounding. code = understand-anything knowledge graph (graph_query.py -> file:line, then real source). wiki = llm-wiki INGESTED pages (conflicts.md + entities/concepts), conflict-resolved (CustomerReq>Spec, UserPrompt>ModelDefault). 'none relevant found' = source consulted, nothing there. step9 = burn-in loop; step10 = phase_F.

dLUNumWriteBoosterBufferAllocUnits is R/O; set WB via Config Descriptor

default LUN = MaxCapacity Enabled LUN (NOT lun 0)

code.claim: non-FUA random write on default LUN
